title: GTA VI + GPT-6: Rockstar's AI Mechanics Revealed
summary: A video claiming to analyze actual Rockstar AI systems in GTA VI by reviewing patents and job postings, arguing against viral "GTA VI × GPT-6" rumors. The creator asserts Rockstar built custom AI for real-time behavioral simulation including witness systems, persistent NPC memory, and dynamic APB mechanics rather than using OpenAI models.
writeup: The video examines Rockstar's AI systems in GTA VI by reviewing patents and job postings, pushing back on viral rumors of a "GTA VI × GPT-6" integration. It argues that Rockstar built custom AI for real-time behavioral simulation rather than relying on OpenAI models. Concrete claims include witness systems, persistent NPC memory, and dynamic APB mechanics. The takeaway: the case rests on documented patents and hiring rather than confirmed product details.
